title: Julien Desclodure
text:
Professional, academic and examination backgrounds









Sep 2023 - present


Data scientist on public local authorities at the General Directorate of Local Authorities. Under the French Ministry of Ecology and Ministry of Interior.





Sep 2021 - Jun 2023


Ensai - French National School of Statistics and Analysis of Information. Trainee statistician attaché.





Jun 2021


Statistician attaché at Insee - French National Institute of Statistics and Economic Studies.





Pre-2021


Teacher, master and agrégation in mathematics.





 Latest projects or publications









2023


Joint analysis of trajectories of antibiotic use and antibiotic resistance between 2014 and 2021 in Europe. Under the direction of Claire Chauvin (Anses Ploufragan Laboratory).





2022


graffiti-conjoncture: a R shiny interface to plot statistics series from Insee. Contribution to the graffiti open source project.





2022


Literature review on the economic impact of Brexit.
